query: SELECT t.id, t.query, t.slug, t.totalArticles, COUNT(na.id) as actual_articles FROM topics t LEFT JOIN newsArticles na ON na.topicId = t.id GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.lastUpdated DESC LIMIT 10;
